The FAfE Accelerator Intro
Welcome!
Very excited to have you here :-)
The Facebook Ads for Ecommerce (FAfE) online training course is a
sub-set of the Facebook Ads Playbook Program. It's designed to give you
direct access to everything you need to get Facebook Ads working for you
profitably through my frameworks and video training.
The Facebook Ads Playbook is a much wider and expansive program,
supported directly by me in a private Mastermind group. If you wish to
upgrade within the first 30-days of purchasing FAfE please email
depesh@zasr.digital
This training portal was initially created to support my agency, SM Commerce and is the
same material we use every day to support our clients and the team use to reference my
teachings too so it remains up to date.
The course is built around growth no matter what stage you're at, using
tried and tested principles, strategies and tactics.
It's designed for those progressing with their Facebook advertising journey,
that have mastered the basics of the platform but are now ready to use
tried and trusted structures and strategies to support growth, through to
those already spending thousands per day that want to focus more on
immediate growth.
The FAfE section of this training is Ecommerce specific and in addition to
the other modules you'll see in the training which are more generic in their
nature.
For any queries regarding your membership, the portal or support with
getting things working fire over an email to depesh@zasr.digital - anything
course related to the Facebook Ads Experts group where I and others can
help.
Onwards and Upwards!
Depesh
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
